portfolio.portfolioSummary: I'm cautious about my portfolio, prioritizing capital preservation over upside growth. I've set strict limits on risk and exposure.

signals.risk: - The single biggest risk or what invalidates this idea is the dominance of BTC, which could lead to an oversold market.
signals.suggestedAction: Reduce position size by 2% to 25% of NAV.
